title: V2.1.1 RHEL backports
body: Backports for a couple fixes that were approved but never made it into the branch.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v2.1.1-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@ashley-cui 's commit message in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/8108/commits/aed918c45984228269974e0a9a92dff154188257 misses reference to https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1873204. Otherwise LGTM.
@jnovy oh how would i fix that? since it's a backport PR
